questions.question: What is the fundamental problem with using centralized exchanges for cross-chain transfers?
options: You must trust a custodial intermediary with your funds
questions.correctAnswer: You must trust a custodial intermediary with your funds

questions.question: What is the main security risk with traditional bridge protocols?
options: They concentrate massive amounts of value in lockup contracts, making them attractive targets
questions.correctAnswer: They concentrate massive amounts of value in lockup contracts, making them attractive targets

questions.question: only swaps works by wrapping tokens on the destination chain.
What role do Solvers play in the only swaps protocol?
options: They verify transactions using threshold cryptography
They provide liquidity by fronting tokens on the destination chain
questions.correctAnswer: They provide liquidity by fronting tokens on the destination chain

questions.question: The dcipher network uses ______ cryptography to verify cross-chain swaps without a single point of trust.
When does a Solver get reimbursed for fulfilling a swap?
options: Immediately after sending tokens on the destination chain
After the dcipher network generates a threshold signature proving the swap is valid
When the user manually confirms receipt
questions.correctAnswer: After the dcipher network generates a threshold signature proving the swap is valid

questions.question: In only swaps, liquidity sits in large pools similar to traditional AMMs.
